---
title: "Breakfast Foods"
description: |
  Battle of the griddle cakes
date: '2026-01-05'
image: "wafflespancakes.jpg"
categories:
    - Food
format: html
toc: true
lightbox: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r}
data = readxl::read_xlsx(here("whiteboardpollresults.xlsx")) %>%
  filter(question == "5")

ggplot(data) +
  geom_bar(aes(x=option,y=votes,fill=option), stat="identity") +
  geom_text(aes(x=option,y=votes,label=votes), vjust=-0.5, color = "black", size = 3) +
  labs(fill="",
       x="",
       y="Votes") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r}
data = readxl::read_xlsx(here("whiteboardpollresults.xlsx")) %>%
  filter(question == "6")

ggplot(data) +
  geom_bar(aes(x=option,y=votes,fill=option), stat="identity") +
  geom_text(aes(x=option,y=votes,label=votes), vjust=-0.5, color = "black", size = 3) +
  labs(fill="",
       x="",
       y="Votes") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```
